answer: missing (default) - Pull the image if it was not found in the image cache, or use the cached image otherwise.
Docker automatically removes the container and its associated anonymous volumes when the container exits.

'host': Run the container in the Docker host's cgroup namespace, 'private': Run the container in its own private cgroup namespace, '': Use the cgroup namespace as configured by the default-cgroupns-mode option on the daemon (default)

Enables all Linux kernel capabilities, disables the default seccomp profile, disables the default AppArmor profile, disables the SELinux process label, grants access to all host devices, makes /sys read-write, and makes cgroups mounts read-write.
